detect-hang.prompt: Run hang detection scan now. Read the 'hangDetection' config from this job definition for per-agent thresholds. Scan all VO agent lock files under Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/state/agents/*/lock. For each lock, check if the age exceeds that agent's hangThresholdMinutes (default 60). For hung jobs: walk the process tree, capture py-spy stack traces for Python processes, classify the hang, decide whether to kill (only if age > killThresholdMinutes), log the incident, and file GitHub issues for new patterns. Skip any agents listed in 'exclude'. Output a scan summary at the end.
detect-hang.description: Scans for hung VO agent jobs, diagnoses via process tree and py-spy, kills if safe, logs incidents

detect-scrum-master.prompt: Run hang detection scan targeting ONLY the scrum-master agent. Use hangThresholdMinutes=30 and killThresholdMinutes=60 for this scan (override the config defaults). Scan ONLY the lock file at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/state/agents/scrum-master/lock. If age >= 30 minutes: walk the process tree, capture py-spy stack traces for Python processes, classify the hang, decide whether to kill (only if age > 60 min), log the incident, and file GitHub issues for new patterns. Output scan summary.
detect-scrum-master.description: One-off hang detection for scrum-master only with 20min hang / 60min kill thresholds

daily-report.prompt: Generate the daily 5W incident report. (1) Parse audit logs from Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/audit/*.jsonl for the past 7 days to extract run durations per agent/job. (2) Collect all hang incidents from Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/hang-scout/incidents/ in the last 24 hours. (3) Collect bug-autopilot performance data: read all run-*-summary.json files from the bugAutopilotPerf.logsPath for the last 24 hours (today) and last 7 days (baseline). Merge per_step_aggregate data across runs. Flag outliers (max > outlierMultiplier * avg), threshold breaches (p95 > stepThresholds), trend increases (> trendAlertPercent vs 7-day avg), and slow bugs (> 2x run average). (4) Generate a self-contained dark-themed HTML report with: executive summary, 5W incident details, pattern summary table, Chart.js runtime trends line chart, runtime summary table, Bug Autopilot Performance Analysis section (run summary table, step performance table with alert badges, grouped bar chart, outlier bugs, top N slowest bugs with stacked-bar step breakdowns), and recommendations. Save to output/hang-scout/daily-report-YYYYMMDD.html and daily-report-latest.html. Open in Edge.
daily-report.description: Generates daily 5W incident report with bug-autopilot performance analysis
